description: Paper-style NPRACH sweep with Format 0/1, NRep 8/32, fixed-step SNR, and uniform random ToA.

notes.channel_model: CFO-only AWGN waveform. EPA1/ETU1 multipath fading is not modeled in this sweep.
notes.correct_detection: Detected NInit must match the transmitted NInit and ToA error must be within 3.646 us.
notes.snr_grid: A single fixed-step SNR grid is used for every Format/NRep/CFO curve.
notes.search_window: The detector search window is limited by the simulated ToA upper bound for each format, instead of always using the full CP span.
